request_payload.exposure_text: I've been following this strategic autonomy debate closely, and I'm really concerned about how some politicians are pushing for more independence without considering the real risks. We've seen time and time again that when countries try to go it alone, they end up vulnerable. Just look at what happened in [Country X] when they cut ties with their allies—suddenly they were exposed to all kinds of threats. We need to be smart about this and not rush into decisions that could leave us isolated. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
